rationale: Educ. Code §33.207 governs contact information for reporting violations in extracurricular athletic activities. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall maintain an existing telephone number and an electronic mail address to allow a person to report a violation of this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
